method_notes: Spot-checked 8 representative SKUs via WebSearch (PcComponentes.pt, CHIP7, PCDiga, KuantoKusta, Globaldata, Fnac, Coditek). Remaining items classified by generation heuristic: all motherboards are AM5 (X870E/B850/X670E/B650) or LGA1700/LGA1851 current-to-previous-gen; all RAM is DDR5 (current). No DDR4 or LGA1200/AM4 legacy SKUs found. Z790/B760 retained as KEEP because they remain widely stocked on PT retail (PCDiga, CHIP7, Globaldata) for LGA1700 upgrades, though Intel has moved to LGA1851 Core Ultra 2.

products.name: MSI MAG B650 Tomahawk WiFi
products.notes: AM5 B650, fully current for Ryzen 7000/9000. Popular mid-range on PT retail. Price in line with market (~210-230 EUR).

products.name: ASUS ROG Maximus Z790 Hero
products.notes: Verified on Fnac.pt marketplace at 687 EUR. Within ±5% of catalog. LGA1700 previous-gen (Core 14th) but still stocked in PT.

products.name: MSI MPG B760M Edge WiFi
products.notes: LGA1700 B760 mATX. Previous-gen Intel but widely stocked. Typical PT retail 170-200 EUR.

products.name: ASUS TUF Gaming B650-PLUS WiFi
products.notes: AM5 B650, current gen. Very common on PT retail at ~200-220 EUR.

products.name: ASUS ROG Strix X670E-E Gaming WiFi
products.notes: X670E AM5 flagship chipset, still stocked on PT retail. Typical 450-500 EUR.

products.name: MSI MEG Z790 ACE
products.notes: LGA1700 enthusiast board. Previous-gen but still sold. Superseded by Z890 ACE (id 138) in same catalog.

products.name: Gigabyte X670E Aorus Master
products.notes: X670E AM5 premium. Available at PcComponentes.pt, Bytestore.pt, CHIP7, Globaldata. Price in normal PT range.

products.name: ASRock B760M Pro RS WiFi
products.notes: CHIP7 lists non-WiFi B760 Pro RS/D4 at 129.90 EUR. WiFi variant commands ~20 EUR premium. Catalog within band but towards top.

products.name: ASUS ROG Crosshair X870E Hero
products.notes: Current-gen AM5 X870E flagship (2024 launch). Available at PcComponentes.pt, Globaldata. International ref ~580 USD but PT retail typically 750-850 EUR with VAT.

products.name: MSI MEG Z890 ACE
products.notes: Current-gen LGA1851 (Core Ultra 2). Available at PcComponentes.pt, KuantoKusta, Globaldata, Coditek. Flagship enthusiast tier.

products.name: Gigabyte B850 AORUS Elite
products.notes: Current-gen AM5 B850 (2025 launch). Mid-range mainstream. Price in line with typical PT retail.

products.name: ASRock Z890 Taichi
products.notes: Current-gen LGA1851 Z890 premium. Launched Q4 2024.

products.name: ASUS ROG Strix B850-F Gaming
products.notes: Current-gen AM5 B850 ROG mid-high. 2025 launch.

products.name: MSI MAG B850 Tomahawk
products.notes: Current-gen AM5 B850 mainstream. Direct successor to B650 Tomahawk.

products.name: Gigabyte Z890 AORUS Master
products.notes: Current-gen LGA1851 Z890 high-end.

products.name: ASRock B850M Pro RS
products.notes: Current-gen AM5 B850 mATX budget. 2025 launch.

products.name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 32GB 6000MHz
products.notes: DDR5-6000 32GB kit is the sweet-spot RAM for AM5 in 2025-2026. Typical PT retail 100-140 EUR at CHIP7/PCDiga/PcComponentes. Catalog slightly above median but within band.

products.name: G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB DDR5 64GB
products.notes: 64GB (2x32GB) DDR5-6400 Trident Z5 RGB currently retails around 300-340 EUR in PT (Pangoly global ref ~980 USD). Catalog at 249.99 is significantly BELOW market — needs upward adjustment or verify speed spec.

products.name: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5 32GB 5600MHz
products.notes: Fury Beast 32GB DDR5-5600 is entry DDR5 kit. PT retail typically 90-115 EUR.

products.name: Corsair Dominator Platinum RGB DDR5 32GB 6200MHz
products.notes: Dominator Platinum premium tier. Price in line with PT retail (~180-220 EUR).

products.name: Kingston Fury Renegade DDR5 32GB 6400MHz
products.notes: Fury Renegade is Kingston's enthusiast line. 32GB 6400 kit typical 140-180 EUR in PT.

products.name: TeamGroup T-Force Delta RGB DDR5 32GB 6000MHz
products.notes: Mid-tier RGB DDR5-6000 32GB. Typical PT retail 105-130 EUR.

products.name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5 16GB 5600MHz
products.notes: 16GB DDR5-5600 budget kit. PT retail 50-70 EUR.

products.name: G.Skill Ripjaws S5 DDR5 32GB 6000MHz
products.notes: Ripjaws S5 is G.Skill's non-RGB mainstream. 32GB 6000 typical 100-130 EUR.

products.name: Crucial DDR5 32GB 4800MHz
products.notes: Entry-level DDR5-4800 JEDEC kit, office/workstation tier. Verified on CHIP7, PcComponentes, KuantoKusta. Typical 70-90 EUR.

products.name: G.Skill Trident Z5 RGB DDR5-7200
products.notes: High-speed DDR5-7200 enthusiast kit. Typical 200-250 EUR for 32GB in PT.

products.name: Corsair Dominator Titanium DDR5-6400
products.notes: Dominator Titanium is Corsair's 2024+ flagship. 6400 MT/s kit premium tier.

products.name: Kingston Fury Beast DDR5-6000
products.notes: Fury Beast 6000 CL30/CL36 kit. Verified stock at CHIP7, PcComponentes, KuantoKusta, Webgate. Typical 110-140 EUR for 32GB.

products.name: TeamGroup T-Force Delta RGB DDR5-7600
products.notes: High-speed 7600 MT/s RGB kit. Enthusiast tier.

products.name: G.Skill Flare X5 DDR5-6000
products.notes: Flare X5 is G.Skill's AMD EXPO-tuned DDR5-6000 mainstream. Very popular for AM5 builds.

products.name: Corsair Vengeance DDR5-5600
products.notes: Vengeance non-RGB 5600 budget kit. Typical 75-100 EUR.

products.name: G.Skill Trident Z5 Neo DDR5-6400
products.notes: Trident Z5 Neo is AMD EXPO variant. 6400 kit premium for AM5.

products.name: Kingston Fury Renegade DDR5-8000
products.notes: Fury Renegade DDR5-8000 (likely 32GB CUDIMM kit for LGA1851). PT retail typically 250-320 EUR. Catalog 379.99 is ~20-35% above market — verify size (48GB module vs 32GB kit) or reduce.
